rationale: Educ. Code §12.057 governs charter school campus status, TRS coverage, and immunity. It has no relation to residence homestead exemptions or property tax appraised value under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 12.057. STATUS. (a) With respect to the operation of a campus or program granted a charter under this subchapter, the governing body of the campus or program provided for under the charter is considered a governmental body for purposes of Chapters 551 and 552, Government Code.
_note: No conflict. The rule text concerns charter school governance, retirement coverage, and liability immunity—unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
